name: Evm
description: This plugin enables interaction with EVM-compatible chains, supporting token transfers, cross-chain bridging, and swaps via LiFi integration.

EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.label: Private Key
EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.help: Hex-encoded private key (starting with 0x) used by the WalletProvider to sign transactions.

EVM_RPC_PROVIDER.label: Rpc Provider
EVM_RPC_PROVIDER.help: Preferred RPC provider: 'alchemy', 'infura', 'ankr', or 'elizacloud'. If set, this provider is used first for all chains it supports, with fallback to others.

ALCHEMY_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ALCHEMY_API_KEY.help: Alchemy API key for RPC access. Supports Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Avalanche, BSC, and many more chains.

INFURA_API_KEY.label: Api Key
INFURA_API_KEY.help: Infura API key for RPC access. Supports Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Avalanche, Linea, and more.

ANKR_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ANKR_API_KEY.help: Ankr premium API key for RPC access. Supports the broadest range of EVM chains.

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ETHEREUM.label: Provider Ethereum
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ETHEREUM.help: Custom RPC URL for Ethereum mainnet (overrides provider-based RPC). For other chains, set ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_<CHAINNAME> (or EVM_PROVIDER_<CHAINNAME>) in your .env.

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_BASE.label: Provider Base
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_BASE.help: Custom RPC URL for Base mainnet (overrides provider-based RPC).

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ARBITRUM.label: Provider Arbitrum
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ARBITRUM.help: Custom RPC URL for Arbitrum One (overrides provider-based RPC).

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_OPTIMISM.label: Provider Optimism
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_OPTIMISM.help: Custom RPC URL for Optimism mainnet (overrides provider-based RPC).

TEE_MODE.label: Mode
TEE_MODE.help: Controls whether Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) mode is enabled.

WALLET_SECRET_SALT.label: Secret Salt
WALLET_SECRET_SALT.help: Salt value for TEE-derived wallet keypair.

SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.label: Rpc Url
SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.help: RPC endpoint URL for Sepolia testnet.

BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.label: Sepolia Rpc Url
BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.help: RPC endpoint URL for Base Sepolia testnet.
